blockingIssues.description: `compose_replay_input_items` now deduplicates overlap by raw `InputItem` equality, so preserve-all replay / durable resume can drop legitimate repeated generated items when base input and generated output share the same text or JSON value.

The added max-turn regression still exercises structured tool outputs instead of a true structured-output agent run using `output_type` / output schema, so the required structured-output `max_turns` path remains uncovered.
The tri-state transport fix changes the public `OpenAIProvider.use_responses_websocket` field from `bool` to `Option<bool>`, introducing a source-breaking API change on a facade-reexported type.

`register_filtered_input_sources()` still guesses source identity when filtered output drops or reorders prepared items, so sent-state can drift and already-delivered server-conversation deltas can replay on later turns.
